race.comment: SHAH JAHAN (5) resumes having debuted in the Listed Talindert Stakes at Flemington, kept very safe in betting there at $5.50 when struggling. He's won a jumpout leading in and can do much better this time around in easier company. GORDACIOUS (1) is a Saxon Warrior gelding for the Stokes yard who debuts off a jumpout win and should be hard to hold out from a wide gate. PANCHENKO (12) is a nicely bred Street Boss filly for the Hawkes yard who has won a Flemington jumpout and is in the mix as well. NO FRIENDS (3) unraced 2yo colt who has trialled seven times. Strongest trial form was when he won at Wodonga on June 29. In the mix.
